text: Repo-link value flow (repo node as leaf sink)
description: Extend the value engine so repo-link edges propagate flow into a leaf sink. Merged aim array = local aims (real intrinsicValue) + one intrinsicValue-0 node per referenced linked repo + the repo edges, fed to the existing calculateAimValues. The repo node receives value only from inflow; exporting flow reduces local retained values (intended — value is conserved flow, not aggregate). totalIntrinsic stays = local intrinsics. Far simpler than the parked aim-level model: no loading the external graph, no cascade-on-expand — the repo is always a single boundary sink. Add a numeric two-node fixture test confirming the boundary semantics (value exported, totalIntrinsic unchanged).
